The A202 is a small but powerful automotive on-board computer that is particularly suitable for vehicles lacking a tachometer, engine temperature gauge and fuel consumption display functions. It is a feature-rich, compact instrument that provides the driver with valuable information about the vehicle's condition and performance. One of the main advantages of the A202 is its ability to display and monitor car battery voltage and generator charging voltage. This allows the driver to keep an eye on the vehicle's electrical system and to detect potential problems such as a weak battery or alternator failure in good time.
